## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint:code` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run coverage` all tests pass, and covered % does not decrease
- [ ] Relevant tests added / updated
- [ ] No leftover debug code or TODO comments
